title: Austrocallerya pilipes
taxonomy: Austrocallerya pilipes is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Faboideae and is further classified into the tribe Millettieae. The genus Austrocallerya is a part of the subfamily Faboideae. The species is native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It is also known as the Himalayan callerya.
